conflict: Tom has spent heating money at the betting shop, forcing Elsie to borrow coal from Noreen while pretending nothing is wrong.
consequence: Material dependence between the two households begins, and Elsie privately accepts that her marriage is financially unstable.
must_land_beats: Historic cold front arrives and daily routines fail immediately
Pregnant neighbors Elsie and Noreen establish mutual reliance
Elsie discovers missing coal money and chooses concealment over confrontation
objective: Keep domestic normalcy as the first severe snow hits Barrow Lane.
